title: rosa tomentosa var. dumetorum
intro: Rosa tomentosa var. dumetorum, also known as the Himalayan rose or Himalayan wild rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa tomentosa var. dumetorum include its ability to reduce stress, improve skin health, and support digestive health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
